payload.answer: Rejecting the proposed overwrite: the existing memory says Sara is Daniele's daughter, which conflicts with the proposed niece relation.
citations: LLM proposes: Sara is Daniele's niece.

entity_resolution.reason: The proposed update directly conflicts with an existing high-confidence relationship; do not overwrite durable memory without explicit evidence or user confirmation.

details: Conflict detected between existing memory and proposed update.
Existing high-confidence fact preserved; no overwrite committed.

repair_options: Ask the user to confirm whether Sara is Daniele's daughter or niece.
Store the proposal as an unresolved alternative only if the system supports non-durable hypotheses.

raw_text: {"intent":"durability_filter","decision":"reject_overwrite","memory_cards":[{"kind":"fact","statement":"Sara is Daniele's daughter.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sara","type":"person","role":"child"},{"name":"Daniele","type":"person","role":"parent"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sara","predicate":"is_daughter_of","object":"Daniele"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"keep_existing","entity_id":null,"reason":"The proposed update directly conflicts with an existing high-confidence relationship; do not overwrite durable memory without explicit evidence or user confirmation."},"conflict_classification":"direct_conflict_overwrite_attempt","answer":"Rejecting the proposed overwrite: the existing memory says Sara is Daniele's daughter, which conflicts with the proposed niece relation.","citations":["Existing: Sara is Daniele's daughter.","LLM proposes: Sara is Daniele's niece."],"repair_options":["Ask the user to confirm whether Sara is Daniele's daughter or niece.","Store the proposal as an unresolved alternative only if the system supports non-durable hypotheses."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Conflict detected between existing memory and proposed update.","Existing high-confidence fact preserved; no overwrite committed."]}}
